description: Query your Apple Health data from Claude, Cursor, and any MCP client — 100% local on your Mac.
name: io.github.krumjahn/health-analyzer-mcp

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Overrides token auto-discovery. The token is generated by the Health Data AI Analyzer Mac app and normally read automatically from its sandboxed container; only set this if auto-discovery fails.
environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_ANALYZER_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: Optional. Absolute path to the local-api-token.txt file written by the Mac app. The server searches default sandbox paths automatically; only set this if auto-discovery fails.
environmentVariables.name: HEALTH_ANALYZER_TOKEN_FILE
